creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
This happens on 13.0-CURRENT r358179 and is probably related to the recent ncurses update.

ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libtextstyle.so.0"
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:528: bn_IN/bn_IN.mo] Error 1
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libtextstyle.so.0"
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:528: cs/cs.mo] Error 1
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:380: all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:717: all-recursive] Error 1
